title: At.exe
html:
At.exe

Schedule periodic tasks

Execute

Create a recurring task, to eg. to keep reverse shell session(s) alive

C:\Windows\System32\at.exe 09:00 /interactive /every:m,t,w,th,f,s,su {CMD}

Create a recurring task to execute every day at a specific time. — MITRE: T1053.002 — Privileges: Local Admin
excerpt: At.exe Schedule periodic tasks Execute Create a recurring task, to eg. to keep reverse shell session(s) alive C:\Windows\System32\at.exe 09:00 /interactive /every:m,t,w,th,f,s,su {CMD} Create a recurring task to execute every day at a specific time.…
